title: Villa Savoye
description: A free plan lifted on pilotis — the five points stated as a domestic prototype.
body: The clearest built statement of the Five Points: a Dom-ino concrete frame lifts the volume on pilotis, freeing both plan and façade from load; ribbon windows run the full perimeter; the roof returns the footprint as a garden.
Circulation is the structure of the experience — a central ramp threads the promenade architecturale from carport to solarium, turning a square plan into a continuous section.
